extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked 5km from summit of Col du Granon after ROGLIC launched repeated attacks from 60km out, dropped POGACAR who lost nearly 3 minutes showing first career weakness.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma placed LAPORTE and VANART in 20-rider breakaway, then attacked with ROGLIC at 60km creating dual-front war.
ROGLIC's repeated attacks on Galibier forced POGACAR's domestiques to chase while VINGEGAARD conserved, then attacked solo on Granon final 5km.
MIKE Rafael's isolation defending alone for UAE on Galibier revealed COVID-weakened team unable to control multi-front assault.
QUINTANA's attack on Granon initially gained but served as springboard for VINGEGAARD, showing GC threats can inadvertently help stronger climber.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: first visible weakness exploitation of POGACAR after being lured to chase on flats, then conserved perfectly for Granon attack
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: initiated attacks 60km out on Galibier forcing UAE isolation, tactical sacrifice enabled VINGEGAARD's later move
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: negative: lost 3 minutes showing first career collapse, passed by YATES and GAUDU indicating complete crack not just bad day
rider_signals.MIKE Rafael: negative: lone UAE domestique unable to control on Galibier, revealing team depth crisis from COVID absences
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: attacked Granon and reached virtual race lead before VINGEGAARD, moved into top-5 GC showing resurgence
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: neutral: won Galibier KOM at 2640m highest Tour point but tactically irrelevant from breakaway
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: reacted well to ROGLIC attacks and finished ahead of POGACAR, moved to 4th overall
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: reached podium position overall after finishing with QUINTANA group, capitalized on POGACAR collapse
